Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jul-14-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT RITE-WAY ROOF CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The judge pro tem's report and recommendation is adopted; the two motions are denied as untimely.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats the Court's ruling and attaches a copy of the pro tem judge's report and recommendation.
